title: Xtra Pungent Kenyan Chicken Skewers
description: A pungent and energizing Kenyan dish featuring Branston pickle and robata-grilled chicken, made in a wok and friendly to ayurvedic sattvic diets. This recipe combines the bold flavors of Kenya with the convenience of a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken to the wok and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped Branston pickle, lemon juice, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper to the wok and stir to combine.
Thread the chicken and pickle mixture onto skewers.
Robata-grill the skewers for 5-7 minutes, turning frequently, until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional Branston pickle if desired.
